message:
refactor(dashboard): switch terminal to PTY-based external SSH

Replace golang.org/x/crypto/ssh with external ssh command via PTY:
- Use creack/pty for pseudo-terminal management
- Simpler architecture: exec ssh command instead of SSH library
- Better compatibility with SSH agent forwarding
- Update TerminalSession to use cmd/pty instead of ssh.Client/Session
- Update tests to pass daemon parameter to NewTerminalHandler

This change prepares for the local IP SSH approach where we shell out
to the ssh command with appropriate options for ephemeral VMs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
